text:
Market today:
Mixed signals. Tech is facing headwinds with Microsoft job cuts and Alibaba's AI ban, suggesting caution. However, broader market sentiment might be buoyed by historical trends of summer rallies, though a "double bubble" warning looms large.

Your holdings:
SOXL (-23.52%) is a major concern, being a leveraged ETF deep in the red. SPAL (-11.17%) is a new, leveraged position also showing significant loss. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch:
Keep a very close eye on the stops for SOXL (200) and SPAL (21.38). Also, watch how broader tech reacts to the Microsoft and Alibaba news.

Bottom line:
Prioritize risk management on your leveraged positions; the market has conflicting signals for tech.
plays: Trim SOXL if it approaches your 200 stop, or consider reducing exposure given its leveraged nature and significant drawdown.
Respect the 21.38 stop on SPAL; this new leveraged position is already down and needs tight management.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The tech sector has some negative headlines, and managing existing risk is paramount.
